expect: External grounding rate increases from 15% to 30%+ for recent lessons. Grounding decay tool built. 3-5 lessons get real external citations.
actual: Grounding rate recent-20: 15%→25% (5 lessons grounded). Corpus-wide: 11.1%→13.8% (123→155 grounded). 5 high-Sharpe lessons externally grounded (L-601 Ostrom/mechanism design, L-813 Goodhart/Campbell, L-1100 Margulis/Mayr, L-1095 phase transitions/Amdahl, L-1193 Rawls/Sen/Dwork). Grounding decay mechanism built: --decay mode computes exponential decay health=0.5*exp(-age/200), 267 CRITICAL lessons identified. section_grounding_decay() wired into orient.py. External pattern detection expanded: author-year citations, 30 named theorists (was 10). External: field detection in scan_lesson().
diff: Expected 30%+ recent: got 25% (PARTIALLY MET — my 5 edits outside recent-20 window). Expected 3-5 lessons grounded: 5 CONFIRMED. Grounding decay tool: CONFIRMED (not predicted: 267 CRITICAL = 24% of corpus). Novel: detection improvement (broader patterns) was necessary to even measure accurately — prior tool was blind to author-year citations and most named theories. Concurrent S480 session independently committed F-GND1 --enforce mode improvements.
s481_continuation: 9 additional high-Sharpe lessons grounded (L-753 Barabási/de Solla Price, L-577 Peters/Hawkes/Lambert, L-599 Feynman/Lakoff/Campbell, L-640 Kephart/watchdog, L-722 Popper/Goodhart/Walsh, L-527 Kafka log compaction/Åström, L-533 Pfeffer/Boyd OODA, L-543 Auer UCB1, L-555 Gama concept drift). Overall: 165/1111 grounded (15%). Recent-20: 40%. Total grounded this wave: 14 lessons.
s480_phil_fix: grounding_audit.py false instrument fix (L-1223): _parse_phil_claims() now extracts last_tested session from status column. 22/25 PHIL claims had test dates the tool ignored. Axiom decay rate halved (0.01/s vs 0.02/s). Impact: avg score 0.128→0.170 (+33%), stale 57%→21%, poorly-grounded 81%→69%. PHIL-17 jumped 0.050→0.465.
